channel.title: GitHub V Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of V in GitHub

item.title: vlang/v
item.description: Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software. Compiles itself in <1s with zero library dependencies. https://vlang.io

item.title: vlang/vinix
item.description: Vinix is an effort to write a modern, fast, and useful operating system in the V programming language
